stem: A rectangle has a length of x units and a width of x - 9 units. If the rectangle has an area of 52 square units, what is the value of x?
rationale: Choice A is correct. The area of the rectangle is x(x - 9) = 52, which gives x2 - 9x - 52 = 0. Factoring: (x - 13)(x + 4) = 0, so x = 13 or x = -4. Since the length must be positive, x = 13. Choice B is the magnitude of the rejected solution. Choices C and D do not satisfy the equation.
